meaning: n.云,烟云,(pl.)天空,污点vt.以云遮敝,玷污,使黯然vi.乌云密布,阴沉
examples: The plane disappeared behind a cloud.
"Cloud Street" is already in its third printing.
The mountains rose above a swathe of thick cloud.
And Oracle, the software, hardware, and database company, recently announced its Cloud API managing infrastructure.
Cloud has greatly encouraged me to become my best self, both spiritually and circumstantially.
